Behind the Work

Pros at every step.

Quality starts before the coating goes down. Real prep, real equipment, real craft.

01 · Prep

Diamond Grinding

Every coating starts with a properly profiled surface. We grind the concrete down to bare so coatings bond — and stay bonded.

02 · Protect

Site Containment

Plastic, dust barriers, marked walkways. We protect your space so you can keep working while we work.

03 · Execute

Commercial-Grade Equipment

Big jobs need big tools. From rail yards to retail, we bring the equipment to handle any square footage.

Our Services

What we do best.

Three specialized services. One trusted team. Every project finished with the same commitment to quality.

⬛
// 01

Floor Coatings

Heavy-duty floor systems for garages, basements, warehouses, and commercial showrooms. Built to handle traffic, chemicals, and time.

  • Garage floor coatings
  • Commercial epoxy systems
  • Polyaspartic coatings
  • Decorative flake finishes
Get a quote →
💎
// 02

Concrete Polishing

High-gloss polished concrete that transforms warehouses, retail stores, and showrooms into premium spaces. Durable, low-maintenance, beautiful.

  • Commercial polished floors
  • Warehouse & industrial
  • Retail & showroom finishes
  • Custom gloss levels
Get a quote →
🎨
// 03

Exterior Painting

Full exterior painting for homes and commercial buildings. Premium prep, premium paint, premium results that hold up to Texas weather.

  • Residential homes
  • Commercial buildings
  • Power washing & prep
  • Long-lasting finishes
Get a quote →

Residential & Commercial.

Whether it's your dream garage or a 50,000 sqft warehouse — we bring the same precision and care to every project.

For Homeowners

Residential

Transform your garage, basement, or home exterior. From stunning floor coatings to fresh exterior paint — we make your home stand out on the block.

For Business Owners

Commercial

Why PROTX

Quality you can stand on.

We don't cut corners. We don't subcontract jobs to whoever's cheapest. We show up, we prep right, and we deliver work we're proud to put our name on. That's why DFW homeowners and business owners keep calling us back.

01

Free On-Site Estimates

We come to you, walk the project, and give you a written quote within 24 hours. No pressure, no surprises.

02

Premium Materials Only

We use top-tier coatings, paints, and equipment because the finish is only as good as what goes into it.

03

Detailed Surface Prep

80% of a great finish is proper prep. We don't skip steps — we grind, clean, and prime before any application.

04

Workmanship Guarantee

We stand behind every job. If something's not right, we make it right. Period.
